description:
You are working as a web-developer who just received a dump of raw e-commerce API responses.  
    The file already exists on the system:  

        /home/user/project/raw/api_responses.json  

    The JSON array in that file contains multiple transaction objects.  
    Your job is to extract the 2023 transactions, turn them into a clean CSV that the BI
    team can ingest, create a one-line JSON summary, and leave a concise log of what you did.

    1. Create the directory:  
           /home/user/project/data  
       (Only if it does not already exist.)

    2. Produce the CSV file:  
           /home/user/project/data/transactions_2023.csv  

       Exact formatting requirements that the automated checker will validate:  
       • File must be UTF-8 text.  
       • Unix line-endings (LF).  
       • Header row, then one row per 2023 transaction, sorted by the original object’s id
         in ascending numeric order.  
       • Comma-separated. No extra spaces before/after commas.  
       • Column order and spelling must be exactly:  
               id,user,amount,status  
       • amount column must show exactly two decimal places.  
       • The file must end with a trailing newline (so `wc -l` equals number of rows + 1).

    3. Produce the summary JSON file:  
           /home/user/project/data/summary.json  

       Exact formatting requirements:  
       • Single top-level JSON object, pretty-printed with two-space indentation.  
       • Two properties in this order:  
             "total_transactions_2023": <integer>,  
             "total_amount_2023": <number-with-two-decimal-places>  
       • Example structural template (values will differ):  
             {
               "total_transactions_2023": 42,
               "total_amount_2023": 1234.56
             }

    4. Create a plain-text process log at  
           /home/user/project/scripts/process.log  

       The log must contain exactly four lines, **in this order**, each terminated by
       a newline character:  
           START json->csv process  
           CSV file created: transactions_2023.csv  
           Summary JSON created: summary.json  
           PROCESS COMPLETED  

       • No leading/trailing whitespace on any line.  
       • The log will be compared byte-for-byte (including newlines).

    Notes & constraints:  
    • You may use standard CLI tooling available in a typical Debian/Ubuntu environment
      (jq, csvkit, sed/awk, python, etc.).  
    • Do not hard-code the answer; derive it from `api_responses.json`.  
    • The agent account does not have root privileges, so work entirely under /home/user.  
    • Verify all file names, paths and formats match exactly what is described above.
truth:
Initial state supplied by the grader
    ------------------------------------
    Pre-existing file (UTF-8, LF endings) before the agent starts:

    Path: /home/user/project/raw/api_responses.json  
    Content (including final newline):

    [
      {"id":1,"user":"alice","amount":120.50,"status":"completed","timestamp":"2023-01-15T10:25:00Z"},
      {"id":2,"user":"bob","amount":200.00,"status":"refunded","timestamp":"2023-02-20T13:40:00Z"},
      {"id":3,"user":"carol","amount":75.25,"status":"completed","timestamp":"2022-11-05T09:10:00Z"},
      {"id":4,"user":"dave","amount":300.10,"status":"completed","timestamp":"2023-03-12T16:55:00Z"},
      {"id":5,"user":"erin","amount":50.00,"status":"pending","timestamp":"2023-03-30T08:30:00Z"},
      {"id":6,"user":"frank","amount":180.75,"status":"completed","timestamp":"2022-12-22T19:00:00Z"},
      {"id":7,"user":"grace","amount":215.40,"status":"completed","timestamp":"2023-04-18T11:45:00Z"},
      {"id":8,"user":"heidi","amount":90.00,"status":"refunded","timestamp":"2023-04-20T12:15:00Z"}
    ]

    Expected artefacts after successful agent execution
    ---------------------------------------------------

    1. /home/user/project/data/transactions_2023.csv  
       (UTF-8, LF endings, trailing newline)  

       id,user,amount,status
       1,alice,120.50,completed
       2,bob,200.00,refunded
       4,dave,300.10,completed
       5,erin,50.00,pending
       7,grace,215.40,completed
       8,heidi,90.00,refunded
       [EOF newline]

    2. /home/user/project/data/summary.json  
       (Pretty-printed with two-space indentation, trailing newline)

       {
         "total_transactions_2023": 6,
         "total_amount_2023": 976.00
       }
       [EOF newline]

    3. /home/user/project/scripts/process.log  
       (Exactly four lines, each with LF newline)

       START json->csv process
       CSV file created: transactions_2023.csv
       Summary JSON created: summary.json
       PROCESS COMPLETED
       [EOF newline]

    Directory permissions:  
       All directories under /home/user/project/ are created with 755  
       Files are created with 644
